title: More Professions + Builder
description: A special variant of More Professions that removes the ability to buy diamonds from the miner, and adds a new Builder profession
body:
A special variant of More Professions that removes the ability to buy diamonds from the miner, and adds a new builder profession.

The builder's item frame item is the ender chest.

Live Version: https://modrinth.com/project/more-professions
